_README: Editor-owned ratings for Calendar listings. The scraper NEVER writes this file, so your ratings survive every re-scrape; they are merged into the listings only at render time. Add one entry per show, keyed by its norm_key (see EDITORIAL.md). Keys starting with '_' are documentation and are ignored. To add a real rating: copy the _example block below, rename its key to the show's real norm_key, and fill in the fields.

_fields.why: <=40 words - why it matters (shown in italic under the listing)
_fields.time: e.g. '30-45 min' - how long to budget
_fields.price: 'Free' or 'Paid' - overrides the automatic Free/Paid detection
_fields.first_timer: true if it is a good first visit
_fields.hidden_gem: true to flag it as a hidden gem

_example.why: One of the strongest exhibitions in Southern California this month. Skip Gallery 1 if short on time - Gallery 3 is essential.
